query:
SELECT 
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientId) as client_id_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as client_secret_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  updatedAt
FROM apiCredentials 
WHERE userId = 1;
command:

  LENGTH(tastytradeClientId) as client_id_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as client_secret_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  updatedAt
FROM apiCredentials
